content.heading: Verify your account
content.message: Your One-Time Password (OTP) for account verification is:

mainAction.style: background: linear-gradient(145deg, #262626 0%, #171717 100%); border: 2px solid #404040; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; text-align: center; margin: 0 0 32px 0; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
mainAction.innerStyle: font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 48px; font-weight: 700; color: #8b5cf6; letter-spacing: 8px; text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
mainAction.topBar: position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8b5cf6 0%, #7c3aed 50%, #6366f1 100%);
mainAction.subtitle: Enter this code to complete verification

warning.text: Important: This OTP expires in 10 minutes. If you didn't request this verification, please ignore this email.

content.heading: Reset your password
content.message: You are receiving this email because you (or someone else) requested to reset your DeployIO account password.
content.instruction: Click the button below to create a new password:

mainAction.style: display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626 0%, #b91c1c 100%); color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; padding: 16px 32px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px 0 rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.3); transition: all 0.2s ease; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;

warning.text: Security Notice: This reset link expires in 30 minutes. If you didn't request this, please ignore this email and your password will remain unchanged.

fallback.title: Can't click the button?
fallback.text: Copy and paste this link into your browser:
